# Suchandra Etti — Full-Stack & Mobile Developer Portfolio

> Portfolio of ETTI S N V V SUCHANDRA, a full-stack and Flutter developer
> building scalable EdTech, mobile, and AI products used by 10,000+ people.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, featured projects, and intro.
- [About](/about): Background, education, and personal story.
- [Projects](/projects): Shipped apps across EdTech, marketplaces, AI, and mobile.
- [Skills](/skills): Tech stack — Flutter, React, Node.js, Python, Firebase, AWS.
- [Experience](/experience): Internships, leadership, and co-founder roles.
- [Certificates](/certificates): Certifications and credentials.
- [Contact](/contact): How to get in touch.

## Optional

- [HOOT 2.0 EdTech](/projects/hoot-edtech): Placement training app, 10K+ users.
- [ACLUB](/projects/aclub-management): College club management platform.
- [Leez](/projects/leez-marketplace): P2P rental marketplace startup.
